items.description: Per-approval batch action outcomes; correlate entries by approvalId.

reason.description: Human-readable detail when skipped or failed.

result.description: Action outcome: processed, skipped, or failed.

status.description: Approval status after the action, when applicable.

limit.description: Requested row page size (0 means no limit).

offset.description: Requested row offset into the filtered result set.

returnedRows.description: Proposal rows returned in this response page.

status.description: Active row status filter, if any.

totalRows.description: Proposal rows after status filter, before limit/offset pagination.

hasPreview.description: True when source image bytes are available for preview.

actionableCount.description: Rows needing merchant action (full run; ignores status filter).

appliedCount.description: Proposal rows with artifact status applied (full run).

applyingCount.description: Rows with approvals currently applying (full run).

approvedCount.description: Rows with approved but not yet applied approvals (full run).

noApprovalCount.description: Proposal rows without a linked approval (full run).

reviewableCount.description: Proposal rows still in review (full run).

fingerprint.description: Optional machine fingerprint for activation check.

adminSession.description: Short-lived HttpOnly standalone administrator session. Unsafe requests also require X-CSRF-Token.
adminSession.name: Mobazha_Admin_Session

basicAuth.description: Standalone admin password via HTTP Basic Auth.

bearerJWT.description: Casdoor JWT issued by the SaaS platform (Mini App / proxy).

nodeAuth.description: Node authentication: Basic Auth (standalone admin), Bearer JWT (SaaS proxy), or Bearer mbz_ API token.

post.description: Freezes the signed pricing amount, canonical payment asset, conversion rate, numeric provider/platform costs, target amount, policy version and expiry before PaymentSession provisioning.

get.description: Returns a PaymentSession projection built from existing order and payment metadata. Settlement modes indicate observed-address, client-signed escrow, or provider-session execution.
get.summary: Unified payment session view for an order

post.description: Creates or idempotently returns a PaymentSession. Fiat: canonical paymentCoin fiat:{provider}:{currency}, fiatAmountCents (>0), and optional PayPal return/cancel URLs. Crypto: optional refundAddress/payerAddress/moderator; buyers should declare refundAddress before paying. Deal cross-currency requests must include paymentSelectionQuoteID from the immutable quote endpoint.

Initiates (or idempotently resumes) an onramp purchase funding the order's current payable attempt. The settlement asset, network, and amount are fixed by the frozen attempt terms; the purchase is a funding source, not a settlement mode, and funded/verified still come only from the on-chain funding observation.
Polls the onramp provider for the order's in-flight purchase, persists the transition, and returns the current onramp funding view (null when nothing is in flight).
